rationale: Exact no-regression guardrail: on questions whose querying key authored no candidates, echo demotion must be a byte-stable no-op (Kendall tau = 1 exactly). Any value below 1 means demotion touched an unaffected query.
Same exact no-op guardrail for the demotion-adjusted-mass arm: with no demoted candidates every cluster's mass equals its raw similarity mass, so ordering must match baseline exactly.

Retrieval-quality floor on the clean corpus. Calibration run 2026-07-16 (local:bge-small-en-v1.5) measured 0.9237; 0.05 margin absorbs cross-platform ONNX float drift near ties without letting a real retrieval regression pass.

Polluted-arm baseline canary — documents the pollution gap the harness exists to close (clean 0.9237 vs polluted 0.7883 on 2026-07-16). A drop below 0.74 means retrieval quality regressed beyond the known pollution cost.

Fixture-integrity tripwire, not a quality goal: with demotion OFF, echoes must still dominate the flat top-3 on affected questions (measured 0.8333 on 2026-07-16). If a corpus edit de-pollutes the dataset, the demotion metrics below would pass vacuously — this bound fails the run instead.

The demotion mechanism's flat-stage effect: same-key session echoes must clear the top-3 on affected questions. Measured 0.0 on 2026-07-16 (from 0.8333 at baseline); 0.1 headroom tolerates one near-tie inversion across the 4 affected questions.
Demotion must surface genuine cross-agent judgments, not merely bury echoes. Measured 0.6617 with echo-on (0.4867 at baseline) on 2026-07-16; floor set one near-tie below the measured value.
Echo demotion must not cost graded relevance overall. Measured 0.8171 on 2026-07-16 (above the 0.7883 baseline — demoting grade-1 echoes lifts grade-3 durables); 0.05 margin below measurement.

Displayed-cluster echo exposure with demotion on (the downstream stage that absorbed the original fix). Measured 0.2019 on 2026-07-16, down from 0.5429 at baseline — demotion's reorder feeds k-means, restructuring clusters. Bound protects that end-to-end improvement.

The §3d lever must never leave MORE echo in the #1 displayed cluster than member-count ordering does. On this synthetic set the two orderings currently coincide (0.2019 on 2026-07-16 — demotion's cluster restructuring leaves mass nothing to flip; the lever's mechanism is proven by the Layer A waterfall test); its material effect is measured on the real polluted golden export.
Diversity guardrail paired with the relevance metrics (utility x surprise ruling: never gate on relevance alone). Measured 0.6393 on 2026-07-16; floor one aspect-slot below measurement.
